item.title: 🇰🇷🇺🇸 South Korea-US tensions flare over North Korea intelligence leak
item.description: Seoul's Unification Minister Chung Dong-young rejects accusations he leaked sensitive information about North Korea's nuclear facilities, straining alliance coordination on Pyongyang policy.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇪🇺 China threatens retaliation against EU firms over cybersecurity plans
item.description: Beijing warns of broad retaliation if Huawei, ZTE and other Chinese companies are penalized under proposed EU cybersecurity regulations, escalating tech tensions.

item.title: 🇱🇧💔 UN reports 350,000 displaced and 177 children killed in Lebanon since March
item.description: UN peacekeepers continue observing Israeli artillery fire in southern Lebanon as humanitarian crisis deepens with over 1 million displaced facing worsening conditions.

item.title: 🇦🇫🇪🇺 EU to host Taliban officials for talks on deporting Afghans
item.description: Taliban officials expected in Brussels for negotiations on returning Afghan migrants to their home country, marking significant diplomatic engagement with the unrecognized government.

item.title: 🇷🇴⚠️ Romania plunges into political turmoil as Social Democrats move to topple PM
item.description: Prime Minister Ilie Bolojan faces ouster after coalition partners accuse him of destroying their social base with austerity measures, deepening Europe's governance instability.

item.title: 🇯🇵🌊 Japan issues tsunami warnings after 7.7 magnitude earthquake
item.description: A powerful 7.7 magnitude earthquake struck off Japan's coast, triggering tsunami warnings and evacuation orders for coastal areas.

item.title: 🇨🇦🇺🇸 Canadian PM Carney says economic ties with US are weakness to address
item.description: Canada's new Prime Minister Mark Carney acknowledges the country's deep economic integration with the United States represents a vulnerability that needs to be addressed.

item.title: 🇳🇿🌊 New Zealand declares state of emergency as severe floods hit
item.description: New Zealand has declared a state of emergency as severe flooding affects multiple regions, forcing evacuations and causing significant damage.

item.title: 🇧🇩🌊 Around 250 Rohingya refugees missing after boat capsizes in Bay of Bengal
item.description: Approximately 250 Rohingya refugees are missing after their boat capsized in the Bay of Bengal, highlighting the ongoing refugee crisis in the region.

item.title: 🇮🇳🚌 At least 21 killed as bus crashes into Kashmir gorge
item.description: At least 21 people were killed and 61 injured when a passenger bus skidded off a road and fell into a gorge in Indian-administered Kashmir.

item.title: 💰🛢️ Oil Prices Surge 6% as US-Iran Ceasefire Falters, Stocks Retreat
item.description: Global oil prices jumped 6% on fears the US-Iran ceasefire could collapse, while stock markets retreated amid uncertainty over Middle East peace talks.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Says Not Under Pressure on Iran Deal as Ceasefire Deadline Looms
item.description: President Trump says he faces no pressure to reach a deal with Iran, as the ceasefire deadline approaches and tensions escalate over the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇮🇷🚢 Iran Vows Retaliation After US Seizes Cargo Ship, Peace Talks Uncertain
item.description: Iran's military warned of retaliation after the US Navy seized an Iranian-flagged cargo ship, casting doubt on peace negotiations as the ceasefire deadline approaches.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Ukraine Officer Deploys 343 Days on Front Line, Highlighting Manpower Crisis
item.description: A Ukrainian officer's 343-day deployment on the front line illustrates the severe manpower shortages facing Ukraine as the war with Russia continues.

item.title: 🇵🇱🇫🇷 Poland and France Discuss Joint Nuclear Exercises as US Commitment Wavers
item.description: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk and French President Emmanuel Macron discussed joint military exercises involving France's nuclear deterrent amid concerns about US reliability.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iranian president voices deep mistrust of US ahead of Islamabad talks
item.description: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian expressed deep mistrust of the United States ahead of potential peace negotiations, complicating efforts to reach a ceasefire extension.

item.title: 🇸🇦🇸🇩 Saudi crown prince hosts Sudan army chief as $1.5B arms deal stalls
item.description: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman hosted Sudan's army chief in Jeddah, though a $1.5 billion Saudi-backed arms deal appears to be facing delays.

item.title: 🇺🇸⚓ US Navy warns sailors to secure social media from Iranian online threats
item.description: The US Navy has issued warnings to sailors to secure their social media accounts amid concerns about Iranian cyber operations targeting service members.

item.title: 🇺🇸🤖 Pentagon deploys AI to vet China ties of university professors
item.description: The Pentagon is using artificial intelligence to screen university professors for potential China ties, following watchdog criticism of understaffing in security vetting.

item.title: 🇦🇫🛢️ African economies strain as Iran shuts Hormuz route again
item.description: African nations face renewed economic pressure as Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz disrupts oil shipments, days after a brief reopening raised hopes.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israel Entrenches Control Over South Lebanon Despite Ceasefire
item.description: Israel is maintaining its military presence in southern Lebanon despite ceasefire agreements, warning residents to stay away from certain areas.

item.title: 🇮🇷🛢️ Gulf States Fear US-Iran Talks May Cement Tehran's Grip on Hormuz
item.description: Gulf states worry that US-Iran negotiations may only secure the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz while leaving Iran's regional influence intact.

item.title: 🇵🇭🇺🇸 Philippines and US Launch Military Exercises Near Taiwan
item.description: The Philippines and United States have begun joint military exercises designed to test real-world readiness amid tensions with China over Taiwan.

item.title: 🇩🇪🇷🇺 Germany Summons Russian Ambassador Over Direct Threats
item.description: Germany has summoned Russia's ambassador after what Berlin described as direct threats from Moscow, escalating diplomatic tensions between the two countries.

item.title: 🇵🇸🕊️ Board of Peace Envoy Sees Progress on Gaza Disarmament Plan
item.description: The board overseeing Gaza's post-war governance reports progress on a disarmament plan, though talks with Hamas remain challenging.
